name: LYMPHOMA OF SPINAL CORD

demographics.Prevalence: 3.3% of CNS lymphoma, 1% of all lymphomas
demographics.Histo: monotonous collection of lymphocytes packed tightly into perivascular space;

discriminating_features: isointense relative to cord on T1WI
hypointense with cord on T2WI (related to high nuclear-to-cytoplasmic ratio)

MR: isointense relative to cord on T1WI
hypointense with cord on T2WI (related to high nuclear-to-cytoplasmic ratio)
restricted diffusion ← high cellularity + reduced extracellular matrix

clinical.Cx: compression of cord due to narrowing of spinal canal
clinical.Rx: initial response to steroids; radiation therapy results in rapid reduction in size +
